name: Stuffed Green Peppers (Santa Maria)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the green peppers and cut off and retain the tops. Remove the seeds and pulp and discard them.
2. Heat oil in a pan and gently fry the onions for 2 minutes.
3. Sprinkle with herbs (parsley) and seasonings (salt and pepper).
4. Add tomatoes and cook together for 2 minutes.
5. Stir in cooked rice and chopped walnuts, cooking until everything is well combined.
6. Fill each pepper with the prepared filling.
7. Place the stuffed peppers on a baking sheet, caps facing up.
8. Drizzle a little oil over each pepper.
9. Bake at 375°F (190°C) until the peppers are nicely browned.
